title: Upon Boreman. Epig.
content:
Boreman takes toll, cheats, natters, lies; yet Boreman,
    For all the devil helps, will be a poor man.
meaning:
"Upon Boreman. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
